mapper.sql: r.id, r.product_id, r.order_id, r.user_id, r.rating, r.content, u.nickname AS reviewer_name, r.created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM product_reviews r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE r.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_reviews WHERE product_id = #{productId}
SELECT AVG(rating) FROM product_reviews WHERE product_id = #{productId}
SELECT order_id FROM product_reviews WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO review_idempotency (id, user_id, endpoint, idempotency_key, request_digest, status) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{endpoint}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{requestDigest}, 'PROCESSING')
mapper.select: SELECT id, request_digest, status, response_http_status, response_body FROM review_idempotency WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND endpoint = #{endpoint} AND idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE review_idempotency SET status = 'COMPLETED', response_http_status = #{httpStatus}, response_code = 'REVIEW_CREATED', response_body = #{responseBody}, resource_id = #{resourceId}, completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PROCESSING'

UPDATE review_idempotency SET status = 'FAILED', response_http_status = #{httpStatus}, response_code = #{responseCode}, response_body = #{responseBody}, completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PROCESSING'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_reviews (id, product_id, order_id, user_id, rating, content) VALUES (#{id}, #{productId}, #{orderId}, #{userId}, #{rating}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM product_reviews r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE r.id = #{reviewId}
